title: Media, Connectors, Transceivers, and Architectures · Retrieval Circuit
summary: Select and document a campus and data-center physical design under distance, bandwidth, environment, and redundancy constraints. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a physical media and topology bill of design after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compare 802.3 copper categories, shielding, distance, speed, duplex, PoE, coaxial, DAC, and twinax use cases.
Compare single-mode and multimode fiber, wavelengths, distance, bandwidth, bend, contamination, and safety concerns.
Compare 802.11, cellular, and satellite media by coverage, latency, capacity, interference, mobility, and cost.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.

steps.title: Separate evidence from confidence
steps.instruction:
review case — Use a changed review case for network media topologies that tests this competency: Compare three-tier, collapsed-core, and spine-leaf architectures plus north-south and east-west traffic.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.
